description: Fragmentary record of sale; the script suggests that this was written in the Ottoman period, probably between the 17th-18th centuries. The document deals with a real estate transaction for a shop by Mordekhay Meyuḥas, who has since died. A few other names are visible: Yahuda Aragīl, Todros Kohen(?), Yosef Kohen(?), and ____ Zimra.
description_he: רשומת מכירה קטועה מהתקופה העות'מנית, 17-18 מאות, עסקת נדל'ן לחנות של מרדכי מיוחס
